choose.when: AND ( RV.RVW_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COMM_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CM.CMNT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR R.RPT_REASON_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT R.RPT_NO AS rptNo, R.RPT_TYPE_CD AS rptTypeCd, R.RPT_REASON_CD AS rptReasonCd, R.RPT_REASON_CONTENT AS rptReasonContent, R.RPT_STATUS_CD AS rptStatusCd, R.RPT_REG_DATE AS rptRegDate, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS reporterName, COALESCE(R.RPT_REVIEW_NO, R.RPT_COMM_NO, R.RPT_CMNT_NO) AS targetId, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS reportedCategory, C.COMM_TITLE AS reportedTitle, COALESCE(RV.RVW_CONTENT, C.COMM_CONTENT, CM.CMNT_CONTENT) AS reportedContent FROM REPORT R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.RPT_REPORTER_NO = M.MBR_ID LEFT JOIN REVIEW RV ON R.RPT_REVIEW_NO = RV.RVW_NO LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY C ON R.RPT_COMM_NO = C.COMM_NO LEFT JOIN COMMENT CM ON R.RPT_CMNT_NO = CM.CMNT_NO WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY R.RPT_REG_DATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.RPT_REPORTER_NO = M.MBR_ID LEFT JOIN REVIEW RV ON R.RPT_REVIEW_NO = RV.RVW_NO LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY C ON R.RPT_COMM_NO = C.COMM_NO LEFT JOIN COMMENT CM ON R.RPT_CMNT_NO = CM.CMNT_NO WHERE 1=1
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT SET RPT_STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, RPT_PROSSR_NO = #{adminId}, RPT_PROSR_DATE = NOW() WHERE RPT_NO = #{rptNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT ( RPT_REPORTER_NO, RPT_TYPE_CD, RPT_REVIEW_NO, RPT_COMM_NO, RPT_CMNT_NO, RPT_REASON_CD, RPT_REASON_CONTENT, RPT_STATUS_CD, RPT_PROSSR_NO, RPT_PROSR_DATE, RPT_REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{rptReporterNo}, #{rptTypeCd}, #{rptReviewNo}, #{rptCommNo}, #{rptCmntNo}, #{rptReasonCd}, #{rptReasonContent}, #{rptStatusCd}, #{rptProsrNo}, #{rptProsrDate}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT RPT_NO AS rptNo, RPT_REPORTER_NO AS rptReporterNo, RPT_TYPE_CD AS rptTypeCd, RPT_REVIEW_NO AS rptReviewNo, RPT_COMM_NO AS rptCommNo, RPT_CMNT_NO AS rptCmntNo, RPT_REASON_CD AS rptReasonCd, RPT_REASON_CONTENT AS rptReasonContent, RPT_STATUS_CD AS rptStatusCd, RPT_PROSSR_NO AS rptProsrNo, RPT_PROSR_DATE AS rptProsrDate, RPT_REG_DATE AS rptRegDate FROM REPORT WHERE RPT_NO = #{rptNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEW SET RVW_USE_YN = 'N', RVW_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo}
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_USE_YN = 'N', COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
UPDATE COMMENT SET CMNT_USE_YN = 'N', CMNT_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmntNo}
UPDATE REVIEW SET RVW_USE_YN = 'Y', RVW_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo}
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_USE_YN = 'Y', COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
UPDATE COMMENT SET CMNT_USE_YN = 'Y', CMNT_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE CMNT_NO = #{cmntNo}
